transcript: You know, in my life, I was facing many challenges and there were points where everything felt dark. There was no light. There was no hope, there was no love. Being on this path and being touched by the poetry and the music and the whirling and the chanting And really focusing on opening my own heart so I can actually allow in the love of, however you want to call it, of God, of the universe, and feel this love in my heart and feel that this is my home. And regardless of whether there is darkness or there is... I'm going through a time which is challenging. I know that I can resort into my own inner space. And I know that there I have this connection which cannot be broken by anything. I have this connection with God, with love, with life. And this is always there. And this is always with me, always loving me, always supporting me. This path actually really helped me to feel that, to feel God, to feel that life is on my side and that I am supported.

timestamps.text: You know, in my life, I was facing many challenges and there were points where everything felt dark. There was no light. There was no hope, there was no love.

Being on this path and being touched by the poetry and the music and the whirling and the chanting And really focusing on opening my own heart so I can actually allow in the love of, however you want to call it, of God, of the universe, and feel this love in my heart and feel that this is my home. And regardless of whether there is darkness or there is... I'm going through a time which is challenging. I know that I can resort into my own inner space. And I know that there I have this connection which cannot be broken by anything. I have this connection with God, with love, with life. And this is always there. And this is always with me, always loving me, always supporting me.
This path actually really helped me to feel that, to feel God, to feel that life is on my side and that I am supported.
